name: polaris-report
description: Verified intelligence from The Polaris Report. Hundreds of curated sources, 18 categories, bias scored, confidence rated. Read-only, no credentials required.
author: The Polaris Report

commands.name: news
commands.description: Get the latest verified news briefs

commands.name: brief
commands.description: Generate an intelligence brief on any topic

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search verified news

commands.name: trending
commands.description: See what's trending right now

commands.name: entities
commands.description: Search extracted entities (people, orgs, products) across briefs

commands.name: trending-entities
commands.description: See which entities are most mentioned in the last 24 hours

commands.name: historical
commands.description: Search briefs within a date range

commands.name: similar
commands.description: Find briefs similar to a given brief using trigram similarity search

commands.name: clusters
commands.description: Get automatic story clusters — related briefs grouped by topic

commands.name: data
commands.description: Query structured data (money, percentages, metrics, counts) extracted from coverage

commands.name: timeline
commands.description: See how a living brief evolved over time — each update, confidence changes, and new sources

commands.name: forecast
commands.description: Get structured predictions on what's likely to happen next for any topic

commands.name: events
commands.description: Browse structured events extracted from coverage (acquisitions, funding, launches, etc.)

commands.name: ticker
commands.description: Resolve or look up a ticker symbol

commands.name: ticker-score
commands.description: Get composite trading signal for a ticker

commands.name: sectors
commands.description: Show all sectors with sentiment overview

commands.name: portfolio
commands.description: Analyze a portfolio of tickers with weights

commands.name: events-calendar
commands.description: Show structured events filterable by ticker

commands.name: web-search
commands.description: Search the web with optional Polaris trust scoring

commands.name: crawl
commands.description: Extract structured content from a URL

commands.name: candles
commands.description: Get OHLCV candlestick data for a ticker

commands.name: technicals
commands.description: Get all technical indicators and signal summary for a ticker

commands.name: market-movers
commands.description: Get top market gainers, losers, and most active stocks

commands.name: economy
commands.description: Get economic indicators (GDP, CPI, unemployment, etc.)

commands.name: crypto
commands.description: Get crypto token data or market overview

commands.name: defi
commands.description: Get DeFi TVL overview or protocol detail

commands.name: screener
commands.description: Screen stocks using natural language
examples: /screener high sentiment crypto with volume spike

commands.name: backtest
commands.description: Backtest a news-driven trading strategy

commands.name: correlation
commands.description: Get correlation matrix for multiple tickers

commands.name: price
commands.description: Get live price and change for a ticker

commands.name: social
commands.description: Get social media sentiment for a ticker (Reddit + Twitter)

commands.name: social-trending
commands.description: See what tickers are trending on social media

commands.name: ipo
commands.description: Get upcoming IPO calendar from SEC EDGAR

commands.name: alerts
commands.description: Create price or sentiment alerts with webhook delivery

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate an AI analysis report for any ticker
